revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4 3-450

A non-directional continuously transmitting radar beacon designed to give an indication of bearing only, the signal extending from own ship's position to the edge of the radar screen and passing through the ramark target.

{{IALAFooter}}
